tips_en: Start with Eywa because its bidirectional FM‑LLM communication framework (the “Tsaheylu” bond) supplies the foundational idea for bridging heterogeneous models, which directly informs both ExoActor’s use of video generation as a unified interface for robot control and the semantic SLAM pipeline’s fusion of vision‑language‑geometric features. Reading Eywa first will clarify the common strategy of modality‑native collaboration across the three papers.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读 Eywa，因为其提出的 FM‑LLM 双向通信接口（“Tsaheylu”）是跨模态协作的基础，能够解释 ExoActor 使用视频生成作为统一接口以及语义 SLAM 中视觉‑语言‑几何融合的共同思路，从而更快把握后两篇的核心技术关联。
